ai-system-name.description: Name of the AI system covered by the SBOM. Example: Fraud Detection Assistant.

ai-system-version.description: Version or release identifier of the AI system. Example: 2.3.1.

author.description: Entity creating or assembling the AI SBOM. Example: AI Governance Office, Example Corp.

license.description: Applicable license statement for the AI SBOM artifact. Example: CC-BY-4.0.

sbom-id.description: Unique identifier of the AI SBOM document. Example: urn:uuid:123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000.

sbom-version.description: Version of the AI SBOM document. Example: 1.0.

standard.description: Serialization or specification used for the AI SBOM. Example: CycloneDX 1.6 with AI profile.

supplier.description: Entity producing or supplying the AI system. Example: Example Corp.

timestamp.description: Date and time when the AI SBOM was generated. Example: 2026-05-12T09:30:00Z.

description: Top-level AI SBOM metadata aligned with BSI minimum elements for SBOM for AI. Reference: BSI, "SBOM for AI — minimum elements" (https://www.bsi.bund.de/SharedDocs/Downloads/EN/BSI/KI/SBOM-for-AI_minimum-elements.pdf?__blob=publicationFile&v=4).
name: ai-sbom
